phonetic: 藞蓴藧t蓹蕣藢k蓲l瑟藞me瑟蕛蓹n
examples: Vehicle twin- photoelectrical pointing system mainly consists of reflex light-tubes, a autocollimation theodolite and modulators.
Using laser beam as a linear reference to realize autocollimation Angle measurement has advantages such as high accuracy, long measurement distance, etc.
The method adopted computer to acquire autocollimation data and reduced test data error caused by manual record, so the veracity of test data was improved.
